serverInfo.name: android-agentic-wiki
serverInfo.description: A Git-backed knowledge graph and MCP server for Android development. Pre-loaded with Senior-level architectural constraints, Google Android Skills, and actionable Jetpack Compose blueprints.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Reads the contents of a file, useful for reading rules and blueprints from the AndroidAgenticWiki.

path.description: Absolute path to the file to read

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Writes content to a file in the AndroidAgenticWiki.

path.description: Absolute path to the file to write

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: Lists the contents of a directory within the AndroidAgenticWiki.

path.description: Absolute path to the directory to list

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search for files matching a pattern within the AndroidAgenticWiki.

path.description: Absolute path to the directory to search
